Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Current Process Pain Points and Opportunities Start to Task A Receive Manual intake Opportunity for AI Chatbot Gateway XOR Check Type Binary decision What about hybrid What if we predict this before submission Standard Path B1 to C1 and C2 to D Parallel checks are good but can they be automated Real time APIs Custom Path B2 to E1 and E2 Feasibility analysis is likely manual slow Rejection is a dead end bad for CX Approval Gateway Is Approval Needed is a static rule Could be dynamic based on risk value Loop Back H to E1 or D Rework loop increases cycle time Task I Send Confirmation End of the line Could be proactive updates
